title: FeatureSpec
description: Lightweight feature session spec derived from the user's original request. Used to match the uncommitted diff during readiness checks.

id.description: Stable identifier for this feature session.

title.description: Short title derived from or provided with the original request.

originalFeatureDescription.description: User's original feature request as entered when starting the session.

expectedKeywords.description: Keywords extracted from the description that should appear in the changed diff.

expectedStatusCodes.description: HTTP status codes extracted from the description, e.g. 404, 410.

riskKeywords.description: Terms from the description that imply higher-risk changes (auth, payment, migration, etc.).
